questions.text: In the selection of the accuracy metrics and their values, has the intended purpose of the system been taken into account, has it been indicated in what aspects?
questions.category: MG01 - Selection of accuracy metrics and their values taking into account the intended purpose of the system

questions.text: Has the correspondence between each selected metric and the intended use of the system been documented in a traceable way?
questions.category: MG01 - Selection of accuracy metrics and their values taking into account the intended purpose of the system

questions.text: Has it been validated that the chosen metrics correctly reflect the expected performance in the actual application contexts of the system?
questions.category: MG01 - Selection of accuracy metrics and their values taking into account the intended purpose of the system

questions.text: Is the selection of accuracy metrics motivated by the mitigation of the risks identified in the risk plan and has such motivation been documented?
questions.category: MG02 - Establish accuracy metrics motivated by risk mitigation

questions.text: Have tests been conducted to study the correlation between the risks detected and the selected metrics that specifically address them?
questions.category: MG02 - Establish accuracy metrics motivated by risk mitigation

questions.text: Have you prioritized metrics that help control the risks with the greatest impact on health, safety, and fundamental rights?
questions.category: MG02 - Establish accuracy metrics motivated by risk mitigation

questions.text: Has the impact of preprocessing the data been considered, making records of the preprocessing operations and their relationship with the results of the accuracy metrics?
questions.category: MG03 - Impact of preprocessing data

questions.text: Has the impact of improving data quality on system accuracy been considered?
questions.category: MG03 - Impact of preprocessing data

questions.text: Has the impact of feature engineering operations on system accuracy been documented and considered?
questions.category: MG03 - Impact of preprocessing data

questions.text: Have you considered the impact of overlearning on accuracy and taken to prevent it?
questions.category: MG04 - Impact of overlearning on accuracy

questions.text: Have cross-validation mechanisms or other methods been implemented to prevent overlearning?
questions.category: MG04 - Impact of overlearning on accuracy

questions.text: Have key indicators been recorded to detect signs of overlearning during training and assessment?
questions.category: MG04 - Impact of overlearning on accuracy

questions.text: Have criteria been defined for the choice of base models and their relevance in each phase of the life cycle?
questions.category: MG05 - Establish base models for systematic comparison

questions.text: Is the accuracy of the model systematically compared during the life cycle with those base models associated with it?
questions.category: MG05 - Establish base models for systematic comparison

questions.text: Does the AI result have a measure of the level of certainty or confidence of the results, which accompanies the outputs of the model?
questions.category: MG06 - Measure of certainty/confidence of results

questions.text: Is the end-user provided with understandable information about the level of certainty in critical contexts?
questions.category: MG06 - Measure of certainty/confidence of results

questions.text: Have confidence thresholds been defined that trigger specific alerts or recommendations, especially for those systems in which a malfunction of the models could lead to serious incidents?
questions.category: MG06 - Measure of certainty/confidence of results

questions.text: Have unit, stress, and integration tests been performed, cumulative during the AI system development process, in relation to accuracy measurement?
questions.category: MG07 - Cumulative unit, stress, and integration tests

questions.text: Are the results of these tests and the actions derived from the results of the tests documented on the evolution of the accuracy metrics?
questions.category: MG07 - Cumulative unit, stress, and integration tests

questions.text: Have limit or failure conditions been defined for these tests where accuracy metrics are no longer acceptable?
questions.category: MG07 - Cumulative unit, stress, and integration tests

questions.text: Is the information related to accuracy metrics updated and centralized, with access to all the actors involved?
questions.category: MG08 - Update and centralize information on accuracy metrics

questions.text: Has a system of versioning or traceability of changes in the documentation related to the metrics been implemented?
questions.category: MG08 - Update and centralize information on accuracy metrics

questions.text: Is there a formal procedure for communicating metric updates to relevant deployment managers?
questions.category: MG08 - Update and centralize information on accuracy metrics

questions.text: Has the target function of the system been selected according to the intended purpose?
questions.category: MG09 - Establish the objective function of the system

questions.text: Have the risks found in the risk analysis been taken into account and how the accuracy of the system influences them?
questions.category: MG09 - Establish the objective function of the system

questions.text: Does the system have a mechanism (graphical interface, alarm, etc.) that allows the user to track the accuracy status, to detect potential malfunctions in line with human surveillance obligations?
questions.category: MG10 - Mechanism for user to track accuracy status

questions.text: Is the operation of such a mechanism properly documented, with explanations of the metrics associated with the accuracy status that allow users to take appropriate readings of the results?
questions.category: MG10 - Mechanism for user to track accuracy status

questions.text: Have users been trained to correctly interpret accuracy tracking information in line with the literacy obligations of relevant personnel in AI systems?
questions.category: MG10 - Mechanism for user to track accuracy status

questions.text: Does the system have a mechanism that stores all the accuracies reported to the user in a history format?
questions.category: MG11 - Mechanism storing accuracy history

questions.text: Can the historical accuracy be consulted by date, version of the model or context of use?
questions.category: MG11 - Mechanism storing accuracy history

questions.text: Is the accuracy history used to improve the model or adjust the confidence threshold?
questions.category: MG11 - Mechanism storing accuracy history

questions.text: During the process of selecting the precision and objective function metric(s), have statistical significance tests been carried out to justify the choices?
questions.category: MG12 - Statistical significance tests

questions.text: Have the results of the significance tests been recorded and documented?
questions.category: MG12 - Statistical significance tests

questions.text: Have minimum significance criteria been defined to accept a metric as valid?
questions.category: MG12 - Statistical significance tests

questions.text: Have comparisons (benchmarks) been made during the design process considering the intended purpose and in relation to the model or family of models used?
questions.category: MG13 - Establish comparisons (benchmarks)

questions.text: Is the use of benchmarks justified, prioritizing those publicly recognized in those cases where relevant?
questions.category: MG13 - Establish comparisons (benchmarks)

questions.text: In the case of using benchmarks with respect to manual measurements or historical data, is the internal benchmark justified and documented, explaining its significance?
questions.category: MG13 - Establish comparisons (benchmarks)

questions.text: Is it documented how the comparisons were made and the results of the comparisons?
questions.category: MG13 - Establish comparisons (benchmarks)

questions.text: Do the system instructions for the user include all relevant accuracy levels and accuracy metrics?
questions.category: MG14 - Include accuracy levels and metrics in user instructions

questions.text: Are the metrics presented in an accessible and understandable format for non-technical users?
questions.category: MG14 - Include accuracy levels and metrics in user instructions
